home.title: Product Catalog | go-core example
home.description: A small product catalog showcasing go-core page composition, SSR-friendly metadata, and Vue hydration.
home.keywords: go-core, product catalog, SSR, Vue, Vite, server rendering

catalog.title: Products | go-core example
catalog.description: Browse the server-rendered product catalog powered by go-core and hydrated by Vue.
catalog.keywords: products, product catalog, go-core, SSR, Vue

product.title: :name | go-core example
product.description: Explore :name in the go-core demo catalog. SKU :sku with live server-composed product details.

productMissing.title: Product not found | go-core example
productMissing.description: The requested product could not be composed for the demo catalog page.
productMissing.keywords: product not found, go-core, SSR, catalog

description.home: The product grid below is composed in Go and bootstrapped into Vue through window.APP_STATE.
description.index: This route demonstrates page-specific metadata with the same server-composed catalog bootstrap.
description.detail: This product detail page is server-composed first, then hydrated by Vue with the same catalog bootstrap.
